summary: This ERC defines a format for identifying tokens in onchain registries using optional human readable aliases. A Token Identifier combines an optional human readable alias, a unique token ID from an onchain registry, and the registry location encoded as an [ERC-7930](./eip-7930.md) interoperable address. This format is useful for NFTs, real-world assets (RWAs), agents, and other tokenized assets. For example, agent registries like [ERC-8004](./eip-8004.md) can use this format to identify agents with human readable names.
title: Human Readable Token Identifiers
